raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/XXXX, I purchased XXXX XXXX. However, I did it without knowing I was able to fully commit due to health concerns. 

I made the initial dispute on XX/XX/year> after trying to resolve the issue with the merchant through email on XX/XX/year>. They refused to refund me even though I never used their product or started the workshop. 

On XX/XX/year> Citi bank completed their investigation and say I the customer am responsible. This is completely unfair. 

The amount is XXXX $ This is a huge amount of money wasted in this economy over something I NEVER USED. 

I do not want this claim to affect my credit score.
